patches.summary: Add a read-only coupon pool monitor that counts remaining unassigned coupon codes and flags low pools.
patches.reason: Klaviyo flow emails can render broken coupon tags when a referenced pool runs out of usable codes; this command exposes a scriptable threshold check.

patches.summary: Add reusable segment, profile, report, audit, deliverability, cleanup, schedule conflict, universal content, image-swap, and flow preset commands.
patches.reason: Klaviyo operators need repeatable CLI workflows for high-leverage growth operations that are not exposed by the generated endpoint mirror commands.
patches.validated_outcome: go build ./...; go test ./internal/cli/ -v -count=1; 33 dry-run smoke commands; live read-only smoke for report deliverability, profiles stats, flows audit, lists audit, and report dashboard

patches.summary: Add root-level computed analytics commands for flow collisions, send fatigue, subject lines, send time, revenue efficiency, segment velocity, flow paths, campaign decay, list quality, and content fatigue.
patches.reason: Klaviyo exposes the raw events and report aggregates, but these actionable cross-entity analytics require local joins, snapshots, and derived scoring.
patches.validated_outcome: go build ./...; go test ./internal/cli/ -v -count=1; dry-run smoke for all 10 Phase 3 commands; live read-only smoke for optimal-send-time, revenue-per-email, subject-line-analysis --source campaign, and list-quality-score
